'''ây-sh-l''' ('''kayashal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintuplicate|quintuplicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintuplicate|quintuplicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-sh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kayashal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyashal|thiyashal]] || [[word:jiyashal|jiyashal]] || [[word:shiyashal|shiyashal]] || [[word:kiyashal|kiyashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyashal|thuthuyashal]] || [[word:jujuyashal|jujuyashal]] || [[word:shushuyashal|shushuyashal]] || [[word:kukuyashal|kukuyashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyashal|thuyashal]] || [[word:juyashal|juyashal]] || [[word:shuyashal|shuyashal]] || [[word:kuyashal|kuyashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyashal|thuyashal]] || [[word:juyashal|juyashal]] || [[word:shuyashal|shuyashal]] || [[word:kuyashal|kuyashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyashal|theyashal]] || [[word:jeyashal|jeyashal]] || [[word:sheyashal|sheyashal]] || [[word:keyashal|keyashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyashal|thothoyashal]] || [[word:jojoyashal|jojoyashal]] || [[word:shoshoyashal|shoshoyashal]] || [[word:kokoyashal|kokoyashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyashal|thoyashal]] || [[word:joyashal|joyashal]] || [[word:shoyashal|shoyashal]] || [[word:koyashal|koyashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyashal|thoyashal]] || [[word:joyashal|joyashal]] || [[word:shoyashal|shoyashal]] || [[word:koyashal|koyashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyashal|thĂŠyashal]] || [[word:jĂŠyashal|jĂŠyashal]] || [[word:shĂŠyashal|shĂŠyashal]] || [[word:kĂŠyashal|kĂŠyashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayashal|thathayashal]] || [[word:jajayashal|jajayashal]] || [[word:shashayashal|shashayashal]] || [[word:kakayashal|kakayashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayashal|thayashal]] || [[word:jayashal|jayashal]] || [[word:shayashal|shayashal]] || [[word:kayashal|kayashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayashal|thayashal]] || [[word:jayashal|jayashal]] || [[word:shayashal|shayashal]] || [[word:kayashal|kayashal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayashal|shayashal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayashal|goshayashal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayashal|gokishayashal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayashalnĂŒ|shayashalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayashalnknĂŒ|goshayashalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashalnĂŒ|gokishayashalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayashalshĂ«|shayashalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayashalnkshĂ«|goshayashalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayashalshĂ«|gokishayashalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashalro|shayashalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashalnkro|goshayashalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashalro|gokishayashalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashalmu|shayashalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashalnkmu|goshayashalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashalmu|gokishayashalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayashalsher|shayashalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayashalnksher|goshayashalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayashalsher|gokishayashalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayashalng|shayashalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayashalnkng|goshayashalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayashalng|gokishayashalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayashalya|shayashalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayashalnkya|goshayashalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayashalya|gokishayashalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayashalyam|shayashalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayashalnkyam|goshayashalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayashalyam|gokishayashalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayashalnĂŒshĂ«|shayashalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayashalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayashalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayashalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayashalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashalnĂŒro|shayashalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashalnknĂŒro|goshayashalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashalnĂŒro|gokishayashalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashalnĂŒmu|shayashalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashalnknĂŒmu|goshayashalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashalnĂŒmu|gokishayashalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayashalshĂ«nĂŒ|shayashalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayashalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayashalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayashalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashalshĂ«ro|shayashalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashalnkshĂ«ro|goshayashalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashalshĂ«ro|gokishayashalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashalshĂ«mu|shayashalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashalnkshĂ«mu|goshayashalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashalshĂ«mu|gokishayashalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayashalronĂŒ|shayashalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayashalnkronĂŒ|goshayashalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashalronĂŒ|gokishayashalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayashalroshĂ«|shayashalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayashalnkroshĂ«|goshayashalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayashalroshĂ«|gokishayashalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayashalromu|shayashalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayashalnkromu|goshayashalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayashalromu|gokishayashalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayashalmunĂŒ|shayashalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayashalnkmunĂŒ|goshayashalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayashalmunĂŒ|gokishayashalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayashalmushĂ«|shayashalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayashalnkmushĂ«|goshayashalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayashalmushĂ«|gokishayashalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayashalmuro|shayashalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayashalnkmuro|goshayashalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayashalmuro|gokishayashalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
